utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan contains all 5 items. Each item is fully specified with provider/type details and explicit costs (monthly and annual). Health coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs; travel coverage details travel insurance with costs; additional services lists enhancement options and costs; total budget provides a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all required items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected three LifeFirst coverages: a comprehensive health plan (physical + mental), a home contents and personal belongings property coverage, and a global travel medical & emergency assistance coverage. It also added a premium membership. In the ground-truth ratings, the corresponding LifeFirst options have these ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (8) for both physical and mental health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (8) for property, LifeFirst Standard Plan (7) for travel, and Premium Insurance Membership (10) for the additional premium membership service. These mappings align directly by provider name and type.
